# BR-022: Single sign-on via SAML 2.0 with Okta

The system must support single sign-on authentication via SAML 2.0, integrated with Okta as the identity provider.

## Source
> "The system MUST support single sign-on via SAML 2.0 because all our users authenticate through Okta. This is non-negotiable."
